acceptance_criteria: Runtime supports configurable sandbox modes with documented defaults and predictable behavior across main vs non-main sessions.
Operators can define per-agent or per-task tool allow/deny rules, enforced before tool execution.
Elevated/host-level execution paths require explicit policy opt-in and produce auditable events.
ao doctor surfaces unsafe policy combinations (for example unrestricted tools with untrusted input paths).
Integration tests validate isolation and policy enforcement under representative workflows.
description:
AO needs explicit sandbox modes and tool allow/deny policies to reduce blast radius when running against untrusted inputs or high-risk automations.

Implementation boundary: runtime policy enforcement in agent-runner and surfaced controls in ao CLI.
title: Enforce policy-based sandbox and tool restrictions per agent/task
